title: Closed Docs Viewer Management Modal Batch
summary: Moved transient Docs Viewer management modal host, focus trap, confirm, text-input, and choice modal behavior into a focused shell helper, then moved metadata parent-picker matching, popup, active-option, selection, dismissal, and parent-id resolution into a focused helper. The management modal controller now keeps metadata, import, and settings modal lifecycle ownership. Updated the management modal smoke fixture to pass the import workflow context explicitly.
